<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band06_chunk006.pdf#page=3 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band06 p254 -->

<!-- header: HORGERTSHAUSEN -->

<!-- header: HÖRGERTSHALISEN -->


[[File:Band06_chunk006_p003_img001.jpg|thumb|Fresken in den Kapellen]]



[[File:Band06_chunk006_p003_img002.jpg|thumb]]


Himmelfahrt Mariens

254
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band06 p255 -->
